name: Intent Classifier
description: LLM few-shot intent classifier + entity extractor for the LLM/Agent Layer. Classifies user input into intent types and extracts entities to guide tool routing and task decomposition.

confidenceThreshold.description: Minimum confidence score for an intent classification to be used. Below this, falls back to 'chat' (general).

maxClassificationTokens.description: Maximum output tokens for the classification LLM call.

enabled.label: Enable Intent Classification
enabled.help: Classify user intent and extract entities before each agent turn.

confidenceThreshold.label: Confidence Threshold
confidenceThreshold.help: How confident the classifier must be to trust its result. Lower values = more aggressive classification.
